title: blanchetia coronata
intro: Blanchetia coronata, also known as the Red Lanten or Lanten, is a species of flowering plant in the family Melastomataceae. It is a shrub or small tree native to tropical Asia, particularly in the Philippines and parts of Indonesia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. Blanchetia coronata is prepared as a decoction or infusion for various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating wounds and infections, and providing relief from headaches and other ailments.
